It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1583]] [[April 24]] - 羽柴秀吉（のちの[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] ）が[[柴田勝家]] 方に属する[[伊勢国|伊勢]] [[亀山城 (伊勢国)|亀山城]] を落城させる（[[賤ヶ岳の戦い]] の前哨戦）。 * [[Keichō]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1603]] [[April 14]] ） - [[日本橋 (東京都中央区)|日本橋]] が開通 * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 19th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1642]] [[April 2]] ） - [[Tokugawa shogunate]] が[[勘定奉行]] を設置 * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1854]] [[March 31]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateと米国使節ペリーが横浜で[[日米和親条約]] （神奈川条約）に調印。[[鎖国]] が解除 * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1860]] [[March 24]] ） - [[桜田門外の変]] 。江戸城桜田門外でTairō・[[井伊直弼]] が水戸浪士らに襲われ死亡 * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[March 26]] ） - Higashiyama Road先鋒総督府が[[相楽総三]] ら[[赤報隊]] 幹部を偽官軍として処刑
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[April 5]] ） - [[後伏見天皇]] 、93代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1336]] ） * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1549]] [[March 31]] ） - [[筒井順慶]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （+ [[1584]] ） * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1749]] [[April 19]] ） - [[大田南畝]] 、[[戯作者]] （+ [[1823]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[April 20]] ） - [[不知火光右ヱ門]] 、11代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1879]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 3]] ） - [[松の門三艸子]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} ・芸者（+ [[1914]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1849]] [[March 26]] ） - [[平田東助]] 、[[Bureaucrat]] ・政治家（+ [[1925]] ） * 嘉永4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1851]] [[April 4]] ） - [[荻野吟子]] 、[[フェミニスト|女性運動家]] 、女医第1号（+ [[1913]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[April 19]] ） - [[杉浦重剛]] 、[[Thinker]] ・[[Educator]] （+ [[1924]] ） * 安政6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[April 5]] ） - [[安井理民]] 、[[総武Railway (初代)|総武Railway]] 創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[April 10]] ） - [[板谷波山]] 、[[陶芸家]] （+ [[1963]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1551]] [[April 8]] ） - [[織田信秀]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の父（* [[1510]] ） * [[Keichō]] 4th year（閏3月） ([[Julian calendar]] [[1599]] [[April 27]] ） - [[Maeda Toshiie]] 、武将・[[五Tairō]] の一人・初代[[Kaga Domain]] 主（* [[1538]] ） * 安政7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1860th year 3月24日） - 井伊直弼、Tokugawa shogunate[[Tairō]] （* [[1815]] ） * 慶応4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1868th year 3月26日） - [[相楽総三]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1839]] ）
== Commemorations == * [[上巳]] ・[[雛祭り]] * [[浜下り]] （ハマウリ） - [[沖縄県|沖縄]] において女子は料理をお重に盛って浜に出て身を清める。[[潮干狩り]] もこの時期に兼ねる。 * 玄天上帝誕辰 - [[道教]] の神[[玄天上帝]] の生誕祭 * サームニエッショーサーム（[[チワン語]] ：samnyiedcosam、三月初三） - [[中華人民共和国|中国]] の[[チワン族]] 伝統の、先祖を盛大に祀る行事。大規模な[[歌垣]] も行われる。 * 中国、[[ベトナム]] の[[コーラオ族]] 独自の正月
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .

== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[April 5]] ） - [[後伏見天皇]] 、93代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1336]] ） * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1549]] [[March 31]] ） - [[筒井順慶]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō}} （+ [[1584]] ） * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1749]] [[April 19]] ） - [[大田南畝]] 、[[戯作者]] （+ [[1823]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[April 20]] ） - [[不知火光右ヱ門]] 、11代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1879]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 3]] ） - [[松の門三艸子]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} ・芸者（+ [[1914]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1849]] [[March 26]] ） - [[平田東助]] 、[[Bureaucrat]] ・政治家（+ [[1925]] ） * 嘉永4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1851]] [[April 4]] ） - [[荻野吟子]] 、[[フェミニスト|女性運動家]] 、女医第1号（+ [[1913]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[April 19]] ） - [[杉浦重剛]] 、[[Thinker]] ・[[Educator]] （+ [[1924]] ） * 安政6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[April 5]] ） - [[安井理民]] 、[[総武Railway (初代)|総武Railway]] 創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[April 10]] ） - [[板谷波山]] 、[[陶芸家]] （+ [[1963]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1551]] [[April 8]] ） - [[織田信秀]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の父（* [[1510]] ） * [[Keichō]] 4th year（閏3月） ([[Julian calendar]] [[1599]] [[April 27]] ） - [[Maeda Toshiie]] 、武将・[[五Tairō]] の一人・初代[[Kaga Domain]] 主（* [[1538]] ） * 安政7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1860th year 3月24日） - 井伊直弼、Tokugawa shogunate[[Tairō]] （* [[1815]] ） * 慶応4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1868th year 3月26日） - [[相楽総三]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1839]] ）
== Commemorations == * [[上巳]] ・[[雛祭り]] * [[浜下り]] （ハマウリ） - [[沖縄県|沖縄]] において女子は料理をお重に盛って浜に出て身を清める。[[潮干狩り]] もこの時期に兼ねる。 * 玄天上帝誕辰 - [[道教]] の神[[玄天上帝]] の生誕祭 * サームニエッショーサーム（[[チワン語]] ：samnyiedcosam、三月初三） - [[中華人民共和国|中国]] の[[チワン族]] 伝統の、先祖を盛大に祀る行事。大規模な[[歌垣]] も行われる。 * 中国、[[ベトナム]] の[[コーラオ族]] 独自の正月

== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1288]] [[April 5]] ） - [[後伏見天皇]] 、93代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1336]] ） * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1549]] [[March 31]] ） - [[筒井順慶]] 、{{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|de|Sengoku-Daimyō|12=draft}} （+ [[1584]] ） * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1749]] [[April 19]] ） - [[大田南畝]] 、[[戯作者]] （+ [[1823]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1825]] [[April 20]] ） - [[不知火光右ヱ門]] 、11代[[Yokozuna]] （+ [[1879]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[April 3]] ） - [[松の門三艸子]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=draft}} ・芸者（+ [[1914]] ） * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1849]] [[March 26]] ） - [[平田東助]] 、[[Bureaucrat]] ・政治家（+ [[1925]] ） * 嘉永4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1851]] [[April 4]] ） - [[荻野吟子]] 、[[フェミニスト|女性運動家]] 、女医第1号（+ [[1913]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[April 19]] ） - [[杉浦重剛]] 、[[Thinker]] ・[[Educator]] （+ [[1924]] ） * 安政6th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1859]] [[April 5]] ） - [[安井理民]] 、[[総武Railway (初代)|総武Railway]] 創業者（+ [[1894]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1872]] [[April 10]] ） - [[板谷波山]] 、[[陶芸家]] （+ [[1963]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1551]] [[April 8]] ） - [[織田信秀]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} ・[[Oda Nobunaga]] の父（* [[1510]] ） * [[Keichō]] 4th year（閏3月） ([[Julian calendar]] [[1599]] [[April 27]] ） - [[Maeda Toshiie]] 、武将・[[五Tairō]] の一人・初代[[Kaga Domain]] 主（* [[1538]] ） * 安政7th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1860th year 3月24日） - 井伊直弼、Tokugawa shogunate[[Tairō]] （* [[1815]] ） * 慶応4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1868th year 3月26日） - [[相楽総三]] 、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1839]] ）
== Commemorations == * [[上巳]] ・[[雛祭り]] * [[浜下り]] （ハマウリ） - [[沖縄県|沖縄]] において女子は料理をお重に盛って浜に出て身を清める。[[潮干狩り]] もこの時期に兼ねる。 * 玄天上帝誕辰 - [[道教]] の神[[玄天上帝]] の生誕祭 * サームニエッショーサーム（[[チワン語]] ：samnyiedcosam、三月初三） - [[中華人民共和国|中国]] の[[チワン族]] 伝統の、先祖を盛大に祀る行事。大規模な[[歌垣]] も行われる。 * 中国、[[ベトナム]] の[[コーラオ族]] 独自の正月

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}}) captured {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家}}’s forces by taking {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日}}) – The {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約}} (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇}}, the 93rd Emperor of Japan (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝}}. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}}) captured {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家}}’s forces by taking {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日}}) – The {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約}} (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}} was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇}}, the 93rd Emperor of Japan (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝}}. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]]

== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇}}, the 93rd Emperor of Japan (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝}}. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.

== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝|12=draft}}. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Return the see also]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=draft}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}) captured {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家|12=draft}}’s forces by taking {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)|12=draft}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋|12=draft}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府|12=draft}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約|12=draft}} (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}} was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇|12=draft}}, the 93rd Emperor of Japan (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶|12=draft}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝|12=draft}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|12=draft}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=draft}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助|12=draft}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子|12=draft}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|12=draft}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=draft}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山|12=draft}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝|12=draft}}. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=draft}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}) captured {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家|12=draft}}’s forces by taking {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)|12=draft}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋|12=draft}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府|12=draft}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約|12=draft}} (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}} was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇|12=draft}}, the 93rd Emperor of Japan (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶|12=draft}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝|12=draft}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|12=draft}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=draft}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助|12=draft}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子|12=draft}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|12=draft}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=draft}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山|12=draft}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝|12=draft}}. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:q]] [[Category:Lunisolar March]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 3 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:March 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 3일]] [[ja:3月3日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初三]] [[en:draft:March 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[en:3月3日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:3月3日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:March 3 (old lunar calendar)]] [[sn:arch 3 (Lunisolar)]]

Emperor of Japan (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶|12=draft}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōta 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=draft}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助|12=draft}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子|12=draft}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=draft}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山|12=draft}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月3日'''（きゅうれきさんがつみっか）は、[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[4月24日]] - 羽柴秀吉（のちの[[豊臣秀吉]]）が[[柴田勝家]]方に属する[[伊勢国|伊勢]][[亀山城 (伊勢国)|亀山城]]を落城させる（[[賤ヶ岳の戦い]]の前哨戦）。 * [[慶長]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1603年]][[4月14日]]） - [[日本橋 (東京都中央区)|日本橋]]が開通 * [[寛永]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1642年]][[4月2日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[勘定奉行]]を設置 * [[嘉永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[3月31日]]） - 江戸幕府と米国使節ペリーが横浜で[[日米和親条約]]（神奈川条約）に調印。[[鎖国]]が解除 * [[安政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1860年]][[3月24日]]）<!-- 閏ならば新暦4月23日 --> - [[桜田門外の変]]。江戸城桜田門外で大老・[[井伊直弼]]が水戸浪士らに襲われ死亡 * [[慶応]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[3月26日]]） - 東山道先鋒総督府が[[相楽総三]]ら[[赤報隊]]幹部を偽官軍として処刑
== 誕生日 == * [[正応]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1288年]][[4月5日]]） - [[後伏見天皇]]、93代[[天皇]]（+ [[1336年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（ユリウス暦[[1549年]][[3月31日]]） - [[筒井順慶]]、[[戦国大名]]（+ [[1584年]]） * [[寛延]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1749年]][[4月19日]]） - [[大田南畝]]、[[戯作者]]（+ [[1823年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[4月20日]]） - [[不知火光右ヱ門]]、11代[[横綱]]（+ [[1879年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[4月3日]]） - [[松の門三艸子]]、[[歌人]]・芸者（+ [[1914年]]） * [[嘉永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1849年]][[3月26日]]） - [[平田東助]]、[[官僚]]・政治家（+ [[1925年]]） * 嘉永4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1851年]][[4月4日]]） - [[荻野吟子]]、[[フェミニスト|女性運動家]]、女医第1号（+ [[1913年]]） * [[安政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[4月19日]]） - [[杉浦重剛]]、[[思想家]]・[[教育者]]（+ [[1924年]]） * 安政6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[4月5日]]） - [[安井理民]]、[[総武鉄道 (初代)|総武鉄道]]創業者（+ [[1894年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月10日]]） - [[板谷波山]]、[[陶芸家]]（+ [[1963年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]21年（ユリウス暦[[1551年]][[3月27日]]） - [[織田信秀]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の父（* [[1511年]]） * [[慶長]]4年（閏3月）（ユリウス暦[[1599年]][[4月27日]]） - [[前田利家]]、武将・[[五大老]]の一人・初代[[加賀藩]]主（* [[1538年]]） * 安政7年（グレゴリオ暦1860年3月24日） - 井伊直弼、江戸幕府[[大老]]（* [[1815年]]） * 慶応4年（グレゴリオ暦1868年3月26日） - [[相楽総三]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1839年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[上巳]]・[[雛祭り]] * [[浜下り]]（ハマウリ） - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]において女子は料理をお重に盛って浜に出て身を清める。[[潮干狩り]]もこの時期に兼ねる。 * 玄天上帝誕辰 - [[道教]]の神[[玄天上帝]]の生誕祭 * サームニエッショーサーム（[[チワン語]]：samnyiedcosam、三月初三） - [[中華人民共和国|中国]]の[[チワン族]]伝統の、先祖を盛大に祀る行事。大規模な[[歌垣]]も行われる。 * 中国、[[ベトナム]]の[[コーラオ族]]独自の正月
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1583]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=draft}} (later known as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|12=draft}}) captured {{ill|Kashida Katsuie|ja|柴田勝家|12=draft}}’s forces by taking {{ill|Ise Province|ja|伊勢|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Kameyama Castle|ja|亀山城 (伊勢国)|12=draft}} in a prelude to the {{ill|Battle of Shizugatake|ja|賤ヶ岳の戦い|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1603]] {{ill|April 14|ja|4月14日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Nihonbashi|ja|日本橋|12=draft}} in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1642]] {{ill|April 2|ja|4月2日|12=draft}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|徳川幕府|12=draft}} established the office of {{ill|Kanjō Bugyō|ja|勘定奉行|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1854]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the {{ill|Nippon-America Treaty|ja|日米和親条約|12=draft}} (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1860]] {{ill|March 24|ja|3月24日|12=draft}}) – During the [[Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}} was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1288]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Later Fushimi Tennō|ja|後伏見天皇|12=draft}}, the 93rd Emperor of Japan (died [[1336]]). * [[Tenbun]] 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1549]] {{ill|March 31|ja|3月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Tsuchi no Junkei|ja|筒井順慶|12=draft}}, a Sengoku daimyō (died [[1584]]). * {{ill|Kannen|ja|寛延|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1749]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōta Nan-Ō|ja|大田南畝|12=draft}}, a playwright (died [[1823]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1825]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|12=draft}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[1879]]). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1832]] {{ill|April 3|ja|4月3日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=draft}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助|12=draft}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子|12=draft}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|12=draft}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=draft}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山|12=draft}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝|12=draft}}. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.

3|ja|4月3日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=draft}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[1914]]). * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1849]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirata Tōsuke|ja|平田東助|12=draft}}, a bureaucrat and politician (died [[1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1851]] {{ill|April 4|ja|4月4日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ogino Ginko|ja|荻野吟子|12=draft}}, a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[1913]]). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1855]] {{ill|April 19|ja|4月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|12=draft}}, a thinker and educator (died [[1924]]). * 安政6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1859]] {{ill|April 5|ja|4月5日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=draft}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[1894]]). * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 10|ja|4月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Itaya Hazan|ja|板谷波山|12=draft}}, a ceramic artist (died [[1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[Tenbun]] 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1551]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobuhide|ja|織田信秀|12=draft}}, a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[1510]]). * [[Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1599]] {{ill|April 27|ja|4月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|前田利家|12=draft}}, a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[1538]]). * 安政7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1860 [[March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|ja|井伊直弼|12=draft}}, Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[1815]]). * 慶応4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} 1868 [[March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – {{ill|Sagara Sōzō|ja|相楽総三|12=draft}}, a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[1839]]).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōmiji|ja|上巳|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hina Matsuri|ja|雛祭り|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=draft}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity {{ill|Xuantian Shangdi|ja|玄天上帝|12=draft}}. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初三]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月3日'''（きゅうれきさんがつみっか）は、[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[天正]]11年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1583年]][[4月24日]] - 羽柴秀吉（のちの[[豊臣秀吉]]）が[[柴田勝家]]方に属する[[伊勢国|伊勢]][[亀山城 (伊勢国)|亀山城]]を落城させる（[[賤ヶ岳の戦い]]の前哨戦）。 * [[慶長]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1603年]][[4月14日]]） - [[日本橋 (東京都中央区)|日本橋]]が開通 * [[寛永]]19年（グレゴリオ暦[[1642年]][[4月2日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[勘定奉行]]を設置 * [[嘉永]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[3月31日]]） - 江戸幕府と米国使節ペリーが横浜で[[日米和親条約]]（神奈川条約）に調印。[[鎖国]]が解除 * [[安政]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1860年]][[3月24日]]）<!-- 閏ならば新暦4月23日 --> - [[桜田門外の変]]。江戸城桜田門外で大老・[[井伊直弼]]が水戸浪士らに襲われ死亡 * [[慶応]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[3月26日]]） - 東山道先鋒総督府が[[相楽総三]]ら[[赤報隊]]幹部を偽官軍として処刑
== 誕生日 == * [[正応]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1288年]][[4月5日]]） - [[後伏見天皇]]、93代[[天皇]]（+ [[1336年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]18年（ユリウス暦[[1549年]][[3月31日]]） - [[筒井順慶]]、[[戦国大名]]（+ [[1584年]]） * [[寛延]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1749年]][[4月19日]]） - [[大田南畝]]、[[戯作者]]（+ [[1823年]]） * [[文政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1825年]][[4月20日]]） - [[不知火光右ヱ門]]、11代[[横綱]]（+ [[1879年]]） * [[天保]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1832年]][[4月3日]]） - [[松の門三艸子]]、[[歌人]]・芸者（+ [[1914年]]） * [[嘉永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1849年]][[3月26日]]） - [[平田東助]]、[[官僚]]・政治家（+ [[1925年]]） * 嘉永4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1851年]][[4月4日]]） - [[荻野吟子]]、[[フェミニスト|女性運動家]]、女医第1号（+ [[1913年]]） * [[安政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[4月19日]]） - [[杉浦重剛]]、[[思想家]]・[[教育者]]（+ [[1924年]]） * 安政6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[4月5日]]） - [[安井理民]]、[[総武鉄道 (初代)|総武鉄道]]創業者（+ [[1894年]]） * [[明治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1872年]][[4月10日]]） - [[板谷波山]]、[[陶芸家]]（+ [[1963年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]21年（ユリウス暦[[1551年]][[3月27日]]） - [[織田信秀]]、[[武将]]・[[織田信長]]の父（* [[1511年]]） * [[慶長]]4年（閏3月）（ユリウス暦[[1599年]][[4月27日]]） - [[前田利家]]、武将・[[五大老]]の一人・初代[[加賀藩]]主（* [[1538年]]） * 安政7年（グレゴリオ暦1860年3月24日） - 井伊直弼、江戸幕府[[大老]]（* [[1815年]]） * 慶応4年（グレゴリオ暦1868年3月26日） - [[相楽総三]]、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1839年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[上巳]]・[[雛祭り]] * [[浜下り]]（ハマウリ） - [[沖縄県|沖縄]]において女子は料理をお重に盛って浜に出て身を清める。[[潮干狩り]]もこの時期に兼ねる。 * 玄天上帝誕辰 - [[道教]]の神[[玄天上帝]]の生誕祭 * サームニエッショーサーム（[[チワン語]]：samnyiedcosam、三月初三） - [[中華人民共和国|中国]]の[[チワン族]]伝統の、先祖を盛大に祀る行事。大規模な[[歌垣]]も行われる。 * 中国、[[ベトナム]]の[[コーラオ族]]独自の正月
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[3月3日 (旧暦)]] to [[March 3 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839268]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 3|qq=March 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) captured [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by taking [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – The [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the office of [[:en:Kanjō bugyō|Kanjō Bugyō]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[:en:Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1288|1288]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Fushimi|Later Fushimi Tennō]], the 93rd Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1336|1336]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – [[:en:Tsutsui Junkei|Tsuchi no Junkei]], a Sengoku daimyō (died [[:en:1584|1584]]). * [[:en:Kan'en|Kannen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1749|1749]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Ōta Nanpo|Ōta Nan-Ō]], a playwright (died [[:en:1823|1823]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiranui Kōuenemon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[:en:1879|1879]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsunomon Sansōko|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Hirata Tosuke|Hirata Tōsuke]], a bureaucrat and politician (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1851|1851]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Ogino Ginko|Ogino Ginko]], a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[:en:1913|1913]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugiura Shigetake|qq=|1=Sugiura Shigetake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1188462}}, a thinker and educator (died [[:en:1924|1924]]). * 安政6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Rimin|qq=|1=Yasui Harutami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450224}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Itaya Hazan|Itaya Hazan]], a ceramic artist (died [[:en:1963|1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 20th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobuhide|Oda Nobuhide]], a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1510|1510]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:April 27|April 27]]) – [[:en:Maeda Toshiie|Maeda Toshiie]], a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[:en:1538|1538]]). * 安政7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1860 [[:en:March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]], Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1815|1815]]). * 慶応4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1868 [[:en:March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – [[:en:Sagara Sōzō|Sagara Sōzō]], a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[:en:1839|1839]]).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Third Festival|Shōmiji]] and [[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hina Matsuri]] * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hama-ori|qq=|1=Hama-ori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11557526}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuantian Shangdi]]. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) captured [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by taking [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.

4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Ogino Ginko|Ogino Ginko]], a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[:en:1913|1913]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] == Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Third Festival|Shōmiji]] and [[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hina Matsuri]] * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hama-ori|qq=|1=Hama-ori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11557526}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuantian Shangdi]]. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.

== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) captured [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by taking [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – The [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.

== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Third Festival|Shōmiji]] and [[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hina Matsuri]] * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hama-ori|qq=|1=Hama-ori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11557526}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuantian Shangdi]]. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.

== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) captured [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by taking [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – The [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the office of [[:en:Kanjō bugyō|Kanjō Bugyō]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.

== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) captured [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by taking [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – The [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the office of [[:en:Kanjō bugyō|Kanjō Bugyō]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 3일]][[wuu:三月初三]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初三]][[zh:三月初三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839268]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 3|qq=March 3}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1583|1583]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q187550}} (later known as [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]) captured [[:en:Shibata Katsuie|Kashida Katsuie]]’s forces by taking [[:en:Ise|Ise Province]]’s [[:en:Kameyama Castle (Mie)|Kameyama Castle]] in a prelude to the [[:en:Battle of Shizugatake|Battle of Shizugatake]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:April 14|April 14]]) – The [[:en:日本橋|Nihonbashi]] in Chūō, Tokyo, was opened. * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 19th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1642|1642]] [[:en:April 2|April 2]]) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the office of [[:en:Kanjō bugyō|Kanjō Bugyō]]. * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate and U.S. envoy Perry signed the [[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Nippon-America Treaty]] (also known as the Kanagawa Treaty) in Yokohama, effectively ending national seclusion. * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1860|1860]] [[:en:March 24|March 24]]) – During the [[:en:Sakuradamon Incident|桜田門外の変]], Tairō [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]] was attacked and killed by rōnin (including Mito rōnin) outside Sakurada Gate of Edo Castle. * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The Higashiyama Road Vanguard Government executed officials, including those of the [[Akahōtai|赤報隊]], as pseudo-officials.
== Births == * [[:en:Shōō (Kamakura period)|Shōō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1288|1288]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Fushimi|Later Fushimi Tennō]], the 93rd Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1336|1336]]). * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 18th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1549|1549]] [[:en:March 31|March 31]]) – [[:en:Tsutsui Junkei|Tsuchi no Junkei]], a Sengoku daimyō (died [[:en:1584|1584]]). * [[:en:Kan'en|Kannen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1749|1749]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Ōta Nanpo|Ōta Nan-Ō]], a playwright (died [[:en:1823|1823]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1825|1825]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – {{ill|Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja|不知火光右ヱ門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiranui Kōuenemon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the 11th Yokozuna (died [[:en:1879|1879]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – {{ill|Matsunomon Sansōko|ja|松の門三艸子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsunomon Sansōko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a waka poet and geisha (died [[:en:1914|1914]]). * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1849|1849]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Hirata Tosuke|Hirata Tōsuke]], a bureaucrat and politician (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * 嘉永4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1851|1851]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Ogino Ginko|Ogino Ginko]], a feminist and Japan’s first female doctor (died [[:en:1913|1913]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – {{ill|Sugiura Shigetake|ja|杉浦重剛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugiura Shigetake|1=Sugiura Shigetake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1188462}}, a thinker and educator (died [[:en:1924|1924]]). * 安政6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:April 5|April 5]]) – {{ill|Yasui Rimin|ja|安井理民|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Rimin|1=Yasui Harutami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450224}}, the founder of the first iteration of the Sōbu Railway (died [[:en:1894|1894]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 10|April 10]]) – [[:en:Itaya Hazan|Itaya Hazan]], a ceramic artist (died [[:en:1963|1963]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] 20th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – [[:en:Oda Nobuhide|Oda Nobuhide]], a military commander and father of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1510|1510]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 4th year (leap March) ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1599|1599]] [[:en:April 27|April 27]]) – [[:en:Maeda Toshiie|Maeda Toshiie]], a military commander and one of the Tairō; he was the first lord of the Kaga Domain (born [[:en:1538|1538]]). * 安政7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1860 [[:en:March 24|ja|3月24日]]) – [[:en:Ii Naosuke|Ii Naosuke]], Tairō of the Tokugawa shogunate (born [[:en:1815|1815]]). * 慶応4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1868 [[:en:March 26|ja|3月26日]]) – [[:en:Sagara Sōzō|Sagara Sōzō]], a proponent of Sonnō jōi (born [[:en:1839|1839]]).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Double Third Festival|Shōmiji]] and [[:en:Hinamatsuri|Hina Matsuri]] * {{ill|Hama-ori|ja|浜下り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hama-ori|1=Hama-ori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11557526}} – In Okinawa, women purify themselves by presenting food in tiered boxes at the beach; this tradition is combined with clam digging. * 玄天上帝誕辰 – The birthday celebration of the Taoist deity [[:en:Xuanwu (god)|Xuantian Shangdi]]. * サームニエッショーサーム – A traditional event of the Zhuang people in China (in their language: samnyiedcosam) celebrating ancestral veneration with large-scale singing gatherings, also known as "三月初三." * An independent New Year celebration by the Khor Lao ethnic group in Vietnam.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|2|3|4|2|3|4|3|0303|qq=}}
